reference: I have viral hepatitis since December eleven, and my liver enzymes were high. In February, the symptoms returned to normal and the liver enzymes were controlled. However, I have found elevated liver enzymes again, with a bilirubin level of one point five, alanine aminotransferase at one hundred and seventy-five, and alkaline phosphatase at three hundred and sixty-five. Please advise on the recurrence of my liver problems and possible treatment.
text: I have viral hepatitis since December 11, and my liver enzymes were high. In February, the symptoms returned to normal and the liver enzymes were controlled. However, I have found elevated liver enzymes again with a bilirubin level of 1.5, alanine aminotransferase at 175, and alkaline phosphatase at 365. Please advise on the recurrence of my liver problems and possible treatment.
